chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3228 of 2025 Abdul Hadi & another Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA 16720/25 3. For hearing of CMA 13942/25 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 01.10.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for petitioners. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, Addl. A.G. Mr. Shajee Siddiqui, advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Talha Javed, advocate for respondents No.10 and 11. -.-.- It is stated that in identical petition No.D-1723 of 2025 in the same situation order dated 23.09.2025 has been passed, copy of which has been placed on record. With the consent of the learned counsel for the parties the petition is disposed of mutatis mutandis on the same terms and conditions contained in the order dated 23.09.2025 passed in C.P. No.D- 1723 and others of 2025 Judge Judge
